_meta.note: First real regression pins for the modular, config-driven textbook scaffold. Every claim is a STRUCTURAL count derived from manuscript/config.yaml (the single source of truth) via the tested loaders textbook.config.unit_blocks / iter_chapters and textbook.toc.build_toc — never hand-copied from prose. The manuscript states these numbers in front_matter.md ('Twelve chapters across four parts') and manuscript/README.md (each part labelled '(3 chapters)', 'One guided lab per chapter', 'One question bank per chapter'). Counts are exact-match pins (abs_tolerance 0): a real regression (adding/removing a part, chapter, lab, or question in config.yaml without updating the prose) drifts the count and fails the test.

structure_num_parts.reason: Number of top-level parts (units) declared in manuscript/config.yaml. The manuscript states 'four parts' (front_matter.md 'About This Template' and 'How to Read This Book'). Re-derived by len(unit_blocks(load_config(manuscript))), not copied from the prose.

structure_num_chapters.reason: Total chapters numbered sequentially across the whole book. The manuscript states 'Twelve chapters across four parts' (front_matter.md 'About This Template'). Re-derived by len(iter_chapters(load_config(manuscript))) — equivalently the last build_toc entry's .number — not copied from the prose.

structure_chapters_per_part.reason: Chapters per part. manuscript/README.md labels every part directory '(3 chapters)' (part_0, part_I, part_II, part_III). Re-derived by grouping iter_chapters by part_id and asserting every group has this size; pin is the single shared per-part count (3).
structure_chapters_per_part.script: PYTHONPATH=<textbook>/src .venv/bin/python -c 'from collections import Counter; from textbook.config import load_config, iter_chapters; c=Counter(ch.part_id for ch in iter_chapters(load_config("<textbook>/manuscript"))); print(set(c.values()))'

structure_num_labs.reason: Number of guided labs declared in manuscript/config.yaml appendices.labs. The manuscript states 'A matching lab ... for every chapter' (front_matter.md) and 'One guided lab per chapter' (README.md) — i.e. one per chapter, so this must equal structure_num_chapters (12). Re-derived by summing appendices.labs[*].files lengths.
structure_num_labs.script: PYTHONPATH=<textbook>/src .venv/bin/python -c 'from textbook.config import load_config; a=load_config("<textbook>/manuscript")["appendices"]; print(sum(len(u["files"]) for u in a["labs"]))'

structure_num_questions.reason: Number of question banks declared in manuscript/config.yaml appendices.questions. The manuscript states 'A matching ... question bank for every chapter' (front_matter.md) and 'One question bank per chapter' (README.md) — one per chapter, so this must equal structure_num_chapters (12). Re-derived by summing appendices.questions[*].files lengths.
structure_num_questions.script: PYTHONPATH=<textbook>/src .venv/bin/python -c 'from textbook.config import load_config; a=load_config("<textbook>/manuscript")["appendices"]; print(sum(len(u["files"]) for u in a["questions"]))'

structure_num_parts.manuscript_section: manuscript/front_matter.md / How to Read This Book (+ About This Template)
structure_num_parts.claim_text: The book is organised into four parts that build on one another. ... Twelve chapters across four parts

structure_num_chapters.claim_text: **Twelve chapters** across four parts, each a valid chapter shell ...

structure_chapters_per_part.claim_text: part_0/ Orientation and Methods (3 chapters); part_I/ Fundamentals (3 chapters); part_II/ Core Systems (3 chapters); part_III/ Applications and Synthesis (3 chapters)

verifier_args.expr: the single shared value of Counter(ch.part_id for ch in iter_chapters(load_config(manuscript))).values()

structure_num_labs.manuscript_section: manuscript/front_matter.md / About This Template (+ manuscript/README.md Layout)
structure_num_labs.claim_text: A matching lab and question bank for every chapter ... One guided lab per chapter, grouped by part

structure_num_questions.manuscript_section: manuscript/front_matter.md / About This Template (+ manuscript/README.md Layout)
structure_num_questions.claim_text: A matching lab and question bank for every chapter ... One question bank per chapter, grouped by part
